untranslatable_reason: This signal requires external data inputs not available in the allowed indicators list: (1) dividend payment dates and amounts between expiration dates, (2) option expiration dates, (3) time spread position tracking, (4) forward pricing calculations based on dividends, (5) spread width measurements relative to options chains. The rule is fundamentally event-driven and options-structure-dependent, requiring access to dividend calendars, options data, and derivatives pricing models that are outside the scope of price/volume/technical indicators. The entry conditions reference 'dividend announcement confirmed and locked in' and 'spread width relative to historical range elevated' which cannot be operationalized from close, volume, RSI, moving averages, ATR, Bollinger Bands, MACD, or other allowed technical indicators alone.
translation_notes: This is an advanced derivatives strategy from Natenberg's work on options spreads. It requires: (1) an external dividend calendar data feed, (2) options chain data with spread width calculations, (3) derivatives pricing models. The signal cannot be translated to a pure technical indicator rule without these external inputs. Implementation would require custom data connectors for dividend data and options pricing feeds.
